printNote: Quick reference for running Python scripts and using the REPL.

entries.commonMistake: Running from wrong directory — use cd to navigate first
Forgetting sys.argv elements are strings — convert with int() or float()
Quote conflicts — use double quotes outside if single quotes inside

entries.description: Run a module as a script
entries.commonMistake: Confusing module name with filename — use 'http.server' not 'http/server.py'

entries.description: Entry point guard — code only runs when file is executed directly

entries.commonMistake: argv[0] is the script name, not the first user argument
